content:
@sigil v0 hybrid
G: timestamp_tolerance
C: webhook_verify ∧ abs_diff_check ∧ "300"_second_limit
P: provider_skew ∧ edge_ts_drift ∧ valid_reject
V: widen_tolerance ∧ clamp_to_provider ∧ "401"_on_excess
A: add_skew_buffer ∧ min_fix ∧ reg_test ∧ assert_"401"_boundary

@sigil v0 hybrid
G: grace_period_fix
C: billing_overdue ∧ middleware_"402" ∧ boundary_loop
P: check_overdue ∧ enforce_"24h"_grace ∧ return_"402"
V: grace_exactly_"24h" ∧ no_charge_loop ∧ "402"_on_overdue
A: min_boundary_fix ∧ reg_test_"24h" ∧ reg_test_"402"

@sigil v0 hybrid
G: "9"_person_delivery
C: "12 weeks" ∧ "PostgreSQL" ∧ compliance_ready ∧ steady_traffic
P: three_squads ∧ two_week_sprints ∧ sec_embedded ∧ audit_gates
V: modular_monolith ∧ "PostgreSQL" ∧ row_level_sec ∧ event_log
A: comply_by_design ∧ ship_incremental ∧ monolith_avoids_overhead ∧ "12 weeks"_fits

G: capsule_micro_arch
C: team_is_"6" ∧ ddl_"9_weeks" ∧ store_"PostgreSQL"
P: async_enrichment ∧ worker_sidecar ∧ pt_mlops
V: "PostgreSQL"_centric ∧ event_driven ∧ sidecar_deploy
A: modular_monolith ∧ pg_notify_bus ∧ sidecar_ml_workers ∧ fits_"6"_in_"9_weeks"

@sigil v0 hybrid
G: path_traversal
C: ".." ∧ no_sanitization ∧ user_controlled_path
V: validate_path ∧ resolve_realpath ∧ reject ∧ ".." ∧ whitelist_dir
A: path_resolve_check ∧ starts_with_base ∧ strip_dotdot ∧ block_traversal

[AUDIT]
Goal: path_traversal.
Constraints: ".." and no_sanitization and user_controlled_path.
Verify: validate_path and resolve_realpath and reject and ".." and whitelist_dir.
Answer target: path_resolve_check and starts_with_base and strip_dotdot and block_traversal.

@sigil v0 hybrid
G: sql_injection
C: "sort" ∧ user_input ∧ unsanitized_concat
P: "SELECT" ∧ raw_query_build ∧ no_parameterization
V: attacker_controls_order ∧ data_exfil_risk ∧ auth_bypass
A: use_allowlist ∧ parameterize_query ∧ reject_raw_concat

[AUDIT]
Goal: sql_injection.
Constraints: "sort" and user_input and unsanitized_concat.
Plan: "SELECT" and raw_query_build and no_parameterization.
Verify: attacker_controls_order and data_exfil_risk and auth_bypass.
Answer target: use_allowlist and parameterize_query and reject_raw_concat.

@sigil v0 hybrid
G: reconcile_batch_refactor
C: "async" reconcileBatch ∧ "await" db_calls ∧ "next(err)" on_db_err
P: load_batch ∧ "await" db.fetchRows ∧ apply_rules ∧ "await" db.save
V: minimal_change ∧ async_await_consistent ∧ "next(err)" propagation
A: wrap_reconcileBatch_"async" ∧ insert_"await"_db_calls ∧ catch_"next(err)" ∧ emit_metrics_last

@sigil v0 hybrid
G: refactor_loadGatewayUser
C: "async" ∧ "await" ∧ sequential_middleware
P: session_check > db_findUser > flags_load > audit_log
V: "await"_each_step ∧ "next(err)"_on_db_err ∧ minimal_change
A: wrap_"async" ∧ "await"_db_findUser ∧ catch_"next(err)" ∧ preserve_order
